text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff… puff… Teio… where are we going?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's that running over there?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: El! Sh-she's really going for it…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, looks like El's revved up today too! 
You two are in the same class, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey, have you ever asked El why she runs?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Why she runs? Well, no, not yet…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She runs in order to prove that she's 
"the world's strongest racer"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Not just in the Twinkle Series, either. She wants to prove 
her strength by also winning races abroad.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The world's strongest… So that's why! El is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Tsk, tsk, tsk. El's not the only one, you know?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmph!!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Grass is incredible too! Well, in her case, maybe "overwhelming"
would be more accurate.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Do you… know why Grass runs?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Haaa…!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: —— "The zenith"!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That's her goal, and what a great goal for a racer to have. 
Who cares if it's simple?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The world's strongest racer and "the zenith"…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Haha! Told you those two are amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Still, "the world's strongest racer" and "the zenith" won't mean 
much when I become the best horsegirl to ever exist.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You know President Symboli Rudolf, right? 
We all say she's the best in Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become like her and be the best horsegirl around. 
No matter who I face, I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: That's because I'm "the Invincible Teio"!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Invincible… So that's your dream…

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah, right now, it's just a dream. 
But we're students of Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you find a trainer here, you'll be able to race 
in the Twinkle Series. And on the racecourse is 
where our dreams lie!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here came to this academy with a dream in their heart.
It's here, and only here, that we can make them come true!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Make your dreams… come true!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, then how about you and I get started already? 
Up for some partner running, new girl?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Partner running… Wait, you mean now?! Me and you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, right now! Come on, no dragging your feet! 
It's racing time!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
By the way, what's your reason? Why do you run? 
What're you at Tracen Academy for?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Why? I…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(But this is no dream. No, I'm here to make my dreams 
come true! That's why… I have to run!)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, we're doing this. Ready, set… GO!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff… puff… huff… puff…!!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good job keeping up, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But… you won't outrun me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(She's fast! The pressure I felt earlier… it's even 
more intense now!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Does… does her strength come from the desire to realize her
dreams?)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well… In that case!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What the?! She completely closed the lead I had!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Teiooo! I…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I came here to be the best horsegirl in Japan!!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: …!! …Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, guess what? You're not beating me, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: AAAHHHHH! RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Tracen Academy… is a place to make dreams come true!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course… so that's it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well then… Do you get it now, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yes!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for showing me the best thing 
about Tracen Academy, Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's nothing. Hehehe!
